title: Protect Microsoft Foundry solutions by using Microsoft Defender for Cloud
summary: Learn how to secure Microsoft Foundry workloads by using Microsoft Defender for Cloud. Discover AI resources across Azure, assess their security posture, protect against runtime threats, and configure model guardrails in Microsoft Foundry to prevent unsafe or policy-violating content.

sections.title: Protect Microsoft Foundry solutions by using Microsoft Defender for Cloud
sections.summary: Learn how to secure Microsoft Foundry workloads by using Microsoft Defender for Cloud. Discover AI resources across Azure, assess their security posture, protect against runtime threats, and configure model guardrails in Microsoft Foundry to prevent unsafe or policy-violating content.

lessons.title: Understand how Microsoft Defender for Cloud supports AI security and governance in Azure
lessons.content_md:
Understand how Microsoft Defender for Cloud strengthens AI security in Azure through posture management and integration with key governance and identity services.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/defender-for-cloud-ai-understand-protections/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Understand how Microsoft Defender for Cloud supports AI security and governance in Azure

lessons.title: Protect AI workloads with Microsoft Defender for Cloud
lessons.content_md:
Learn how Microsoft Defender for Cloud extends protection to AI workloads across Azure. See how it discovers AI resources, assesses configuration risks, detects active threats, and integrates with Microsoft Defender XDR for unified investigation and response.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/defender-for-cloud-ai-protect-workloads/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Protect AI workloads with Microsoft Defender for Cloud

lessons.title: Configure and manage guardrails in Microsoft Foundry
lessons.content_md:
Safeguard your AI workloads with Microsoft Foundry guardrails. Discover how to configure and validate content filters, blocklists, and Prompt Shields to protect sensitive data, ensure responsible model behavior, and continuously improve AI safety.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/azure-ai-foundry-configure-manage-guardrails/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Configure and manage guardrails in Microsoft Foundry

lessons.title: Secure Microsoft Foundry environments
lessons.content_md:
Secure Microsoft Foundry environments by applying layered protections across identity, secrets, networks, and diagnostics. This module explains how to manage access with Microsoft Entra ID and project roles, protect credentials with Key Vault, and isolate workloads through private network connections. It also covers enabling diagnostic logging to strengthen visibility and auditing. These practices help you build trusted, compliant AI environments that support collaboration safely.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/azure-ai-foundry-secure-environment/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Protect Microsoft Foundry solutions by using Microsoft Defender for Cloud
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Protect Microsoft Foundry solutions by using Microsoft Defender for Cloud**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
